name: Dictionary Manipulation
description: Test dictionary operations including grouping and aggregation
prompt:
Apa output dari kode Python berikut?

```python
penjualan = [
    {"produk": "A", "qty": 10},
    {"produk": "B", "qty": 5},
    {"produk": "A", "qty": 7},
    {"produk": "C", "qty": 3},
    {"produk": "B", "qty": 8}
]

total = {}
for item in penjualan:
    p = item["produk"]
    total[p] = total.get(p, 0) + item["qty"]

print(total["A"] + total["B"])
```
